title: Accessibility - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility at Environment and Climate Change Canada
Includes topics, programs and other initiatives from our Department related to accessibility for Canadians with disabilities.
- Comment on our accessibility plan
- Describe accessibility barriers you have experienced with Environment and Climate Change Canada
Our plans to identify, remove and prevent barriers to accessibility and contribute to an accessible and barrier-free Canada.
Accessibility progress reports on the implementation of the Environment and Climate Change Canada Accessibility Plans.

### Accessibility feedback process
Information on the different ways to provide feedback, ow to request alternate formats,  what we do with your feedback and how to keep your feedback anonymous.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
